cache.description: CoreDNS cache plugin configuration for a zone.

ttl.description: Top-level TTL cap applied to all cached entries (seconds).

zones.description: Zones the cache applies to (cache 'ZONES'). If empty, the zones from the server block are used.

capacity.description: Maximum number of positive responses to cache.

ttl.description: Max TTL for positive responses (seconds). Defaults to configmap.cache for backward compatibility.

capacity.description: Maximum number of negative responses to cache.

prefetch.description: Prefetch popular cache entries before they expire.

amount.description: Prefetch entries accessed at least this many times. Required to enable prefetch.

duration.description: Only prefetch if the entry was requested within this duration (e.g. 1m).

percentage.description: Only prefetch if this percentage of TTL remains. Requires duration.

serveStale.description: Serve stale (expired) cache entries while fetching a fresh answer.

enabled.description: Enable serving stale cache entries while refreshing.

duration.description: How long stale answers may be served (e.g. 1h).

refreshMode.description: Refresh mode for stale entries. 'immediate' serves the stale entry before checking the source; 'verify' confirms the entry is still unavailable first.

verifyTimeout.description: Only valid with refreshMode 'verify'. Bounds how long the cache waits for the upstream verify before falling back to the stale entry (e.g. 100ms). Default 0 waits for the upstream's own timeout.

duration.description: How long to cache SERVFAIL responses (e.g. 5s). Set to 0 to disable.

disable.description: Disable caching for specific response types.

successZones.description: Limit the success-cache disable to these zones (disable success 'ZONES'). Omit to disable for all zones.

denialZones.description: Limit the denial-cache disable to these zones (disable denial 'ZONES'). Omit to disable for all zones.

keepttl.description: Preserve original TTLs in cached responses instead of counting down.

forward.description: Structured forward directive, mirroring the CoreDNS forward block. 'to' holds the upstream targets (FROM is always '.') and the remaining keys are forward plugin parameters. Only a representative subset is exposed; extend by adding keys here and in the coredns.forwardBlock helper.

to.description: List of upstream DNS server addresses (the forward 'TO...' targets). Empty list falls back to /etc/resolv.conf.

forceTCP.description: Always use TCP to the upstream (forward 'force_tcp').

preferUDP.description: Try UDP first even for queries received over TCP (forward 'prefer_udp').

maxFails.description: Consecutive failed health checks before an upstream is considered down (forward 'max_fails').

maxConnectAttempts.description: Cap on total upstream connect attempts per request (forward 'max_connect_attempts'). 0 means no cap.

maxIdleConns.description: Maximum idle connections cached per upstream for reuse (forward 'max_idle_conns'). 0 means unlimited.

healthCheck.description: Upstream health-check configuration (forward 'health_check'), e.g. '0.2s', '0.2s no_rec', or '5s domain example.org'.

tls.description: TLS configuration for the upstream connection (forward 'tls'). Provide cert+key (client auth), ca (custom server verification), all three, or set enabled for a bare 'tls' using system CAs.

enabled.description: Emit a bare 'tls' directive (system CAs, no client auth) when no cert/key/ca are set.

ca.description: CA certificate file path used to verify the server certificate.

tlsServername.description: Server name expected in the upstream TLS certificate (forward 'tls_servername'), e.g. 'dns.quad9.net'. Strongly recommended when forwarding over TLS.

expire.description: Close idle upstream connections after this duration (forward 'expire'), e.g. '10s'.

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent queries to forward (forward 'max_concurrent').

next.description: Response codes that cause the next forward plugin to be executed (forward 'next'), e.g. ['NXDOMAIN'].

nextOnNodata.description: Execute the next forward plugin when the upstream returns NOERROR with an empty answer (forward 'next_on_nodata').

failfastAllUnhealthyUpstreams.description: Immediately return SERVFAIL when all upstreams are unhealthy instead of spraying to a random upstream (forward 'failfast_all_unhealthy_upstreams').

failover.description: Response codes that trigger a retry on the next upstream (forward 'failover'), e.g. ['SERVFAIL', 'REFUSED']. NOERROR is not allowed.

resolver.description: DNS resolver addresses used to resolve hostname-based 'to' endpoints at startup (forward 'resolver'), each a bare IP or IP:PORT.

except.description: Domain names to pass through unforwarded (forward 'except').

kubernetes.description: Structured kubernetes plugin parameters, mirroring the CoreDNS kubernetes block. Only a representative subset is exposed; extend by adding keys here and in the coredns.kubernetesBlock helper.

endpoint.description: URL of a remote k8s API endpoint (kubernetes 'endpoint'). Omit to connect in-cluster. Ignored when kubeconfig is set.

tls.description: TLS cert, key and CA cert file paths for a remote k8s connection (kubernetes 'tls'). Ignored when connecting in-cluster.

kubeconfig.description: Authenticate to a remote k8s cluster using a kubeconfig file (kubernetes 'kubeconfig').

context.description: Optional kubeconfig context. Defaults to the current context.

apiserverQPS.description: Maximum queries-per-second rate limit for API server requests (kubernetes 'apiserver_qps').

apiserverBurst.description: Maximum burst size for API server requests (kubernetes 'apiserver_burst').

apiserverMaxInflight.description: Maximum number of concurrent in-flight API server requests (kubernetes 'apiserver_max_inflight').

ttl.description: Custom response TTL in seconds, range 0–3600 (kubernetes 'ttl').

endpointPodNames.description: Use the pod name instead of the dashed IP in endpoint records (kubernetes 'endpoint_pod_names').

namespaceLabels.description: Expose only namespaces matching this label selector expression (kubernetes 'namespace_labels').

labels.description: Expose only objects matching this label selector expression (kubernetes 'labels').

ignoreEmptyService.description: Return NXDOMAIN for services without ready endpoints (kubernetes 'ignore empty_service').

fallthrough.description: Pass unresolved queries to the next plugin for all authoritative zones (kubernetes 'fallthrough'). Ignored when fallthroughZones is set.

fallthroughZones.description: Limit fallthrough to these zones (kubernetes 'fallthrough ZONES'), e.g. ['in-addr.arpa', 'ip6.arpa'].

multicluster.description: Multicluster zones served via the MCS-API (kubernetes 'multicluster'). The plugin must be authoritative for these zones.

startupTimeout.description: Time to wait for the informer cache to sync at startup (kubernetes 'startup_timeout'), e.g. '5s'.

log.description: List of CoreDNS log classes to emit for a zone. Omit to fall back to denial+error.

loadbalance.description: Load balancing policy applied to a zone's DNS responses with multiple A/AAAA records. Omit to fall back to round_robin.

name.description: Name used for all chart resources.

namespace.description: Namespace to deploy all chart resources into.

serviceType.description: Giant Swarm service type label value.

securityContext.description: Pod-level security context for CoreDNS containers.

runAsUser.description: UID to run the CoreDNS container as.

runAsGroup.description: GID to run the CoreDNS container as.

service.description: Settings for the CoreDNS ClusterIP Service.

clusterIP.description: Fixed ClusterIP assigned to the CoreDNS service. Must be within the cluster service CIDR.

ports.description: Network ports used by CoreDNS. Shared across the Corefile, Deployments, and NetworkPolicy.

name.description: Port name used in Service and container port definitions.

targetPort.description: Container port CoreDNS listens on (typically 1053 to avoid requiring CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE).

port.description: Port CoreDNS exposes Prometheus metrics on.

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits for CoreDNS containers.

podDisruptionBudget.description: PodDisruptionBudget spec. Only created when hpa.maxReplicas > 1.

hpa.description: HorizontalPodAutoscaler configuration for the workers Deployment.

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target CPU utilization percentage for scaling. Set to 0 to disable CPU-based scaling.

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target memory utilization percentage for scaling. Set to 0 to disable memory-based scaling.

stabilizationWindowSeconds.description: Seconds to wait before scaling down after a scale-up event. Increase for large clusters to avoid flapping.

controlPlane.description: Configuration for the CoreDNS Deployment targeting control-plane nodes.

enabled.description: Deploy a dedicated CoreDNS instance on control-plane nodes. When unset, inherits mastersInstance.enabled for backward compatibility.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector labels used to schedule the control-plane CoreDNS pods.

coredns.description: CoreDNS Corefile configuration. Cache, logging, and load balancing are configured per zone.

public.description: Configuration for the '.' (catch-all) forward zone that handles external DNS lookups.

cache.description: Per-zone cache configuration for the '.' zone.

log.description: Per-zone log classes for the '.' zone.

loadbalance.description: Per-zone load balancing policy for the '.' zone.

autopath.description: Autopath plugin arguments (e.g. '@kubernetes'). Leave empty to disable.

cluster.description: Configuration for the cluster-local DNS zone (kubernetes plugin).

domains.description: List of local cluster domains served by the kubernetes plugin.

serviceCIDR.description: Kubernetes service IP range (--service-cluster-ip-range). Used by the kubernetes plugin for PTR record handling.

podCIDR.description: Pod network CIDR (--pod-network-cidr). Used by the kubernetes plugin for PTR record handling.

cache.description: Per-zone cache configuration for the cluster-local zone.

log.description: Per-zone log classes for the cluster-local zone.

loadbalance.description: Per-zone load balancing policy for the cluster-local zone.

additionalZones.description: Additional local DNS zones, each rendered as its own fully-templated CoreDNS server block.

names.description: Zone names served by this server block.

cidrs.description: Optional reverse (PTR) ranges, appended to the zone line and the kubernetes directive args.

cache.description: Optional per-zone cache configuration. Omit to use built-in defaults.

log.description: Optional per-zone log classes. Omit to use built-in defaults.

loadbalance.description: Optional per-zone load balancing policy. Omit to use built-in defaults.

custom.description: Raw Corefile content appended verbatim at the end of the generated Corefile. Use for plugins or directives not covered by the structured values.

adopter.description: One-shot Job that adopts existing CoreDNS resources during initial chart installation.

enabled.description: Run the adopter Job on install.

image.description: Full image reference (registry/name:tag) for the adopter Job container.
